section_text_parts: Also notice that FastAPI is smart enough to notice that the path parameter item_id is a path parameter and q is not, so, it's a query parameter.
tutorial/query-params::section-0003::adm.section_text: Also notice that FastAPI is smart enough to notice that the path parameter item_id is a path parameter and q is not, so, it's a query parameter.

section_text_parts: You could also use Enum s the same way as with Path Parameters .
tutorial/query-params::section-0006::adm.section_text: You could also use Enum s the same way as with Path Parameters .
